name: Garlic Soup Provencal
recipeIngredient: 1 large Peeled potato, cut into 2-3 chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. To peel the garlic, separate the cloves and drop them into boiling water for 30 seconds. Drain, rinse the cloves in cold water, then peel them.
2. Sauté the sliced leeks in the oil until tender.
3. Add the sautéed leeks, all other ingredients, and chicken stock to a soup pot. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 35 to 45 minutes, or until the garlic is tender and dissolving.
5. Remove the cooked potatoes from the soup using a slotted spoon. Whisk them smooth.
6. Return the whisked potatoes to the soup and stir until well combined.
Note: This recipe serves 4 people.
